skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.

skill1.note: Exact; per note this accelerates all allies' last-bullet procs (emergent interaction).

Present in top-level prose; the skill1_detail description_value_list only carries 3 value groups (ATK/reload/maxAmmo) — this 4th line is sourced from prose, not the detail table. Flag for hand-verify (auto-filled from offline parser).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when the last bullet hits the target. Affects the target.

skill2.note: Treasure value (base detail table differs). Exact.

skill2.kitLine: Deals 256.17% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill2.note: Treasure value (base detail = 85.79%). noRange per Q1 calibration — exempt from range/FB majors.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when the last bullet hits a target in Designated Target status. Affects the target.
skill2.note: PROXY: true gate is last-bullet-on-Designated-Target; modeled as burstCast proxy (Designated applied by her burst every other rotation). Not a faithful trigger — see confounds.

skill2.kitLine: Deals 1687% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill2.where: skill2[1].effects[0] dot atkPct 1687 / 10s, intervalSec 3, noRange, noFb
skill2.note: PROXY: modeled as DoT ticking ~3s x3 (last-bullet cadence under halved mag), not a discrete last-bullet rider. noFb per confirmed video. Comp/condition-dependent — standing open item.

burst.kitLine: Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 130% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Encoded in Element bucket (elemAdvantageDamagePct); damage-up only with elemental advantage. Battery-5 evidence 2.8244 in/out window.

burst.kitLine: Deals 1407.64% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.note: Treasure value (base detail = 457.87%). This is the parser's front nuke, distinct from the 1687% rider.
Deliberately dropped: boss never acts in v1, mechanically inert.
Modeled despite note calling it irrelevant in v1 (boss never acts / single partless boss). Also this Designated-Target application is the gate the 1687% rider keys off.

documentedConfounds.text: Q1 CALIBRATED: the 256.17% last-bullet proc and the 1687% Designated hits are exempt from the +30% range and +50% full-burst majors (noRange:true). Calibrated vs real T4 runs (1.29->0.97); mechanism unconfirmed (user researching).
documentedConfounds.why: A calibrated fudge with unconfirmed mechanism — if the exemption is wrong/conditional, both riders shift. Flagged in note for manual review.

documentedConfounds.text: The 1687% nuke is COMP/CONDITION-DEPENDENT: present in T4/T4b calibration comps (real 1140M needs ~40% more than sim produces without it) but ABSENT in a confirmed Privaty-burst Designated window in the u7 focus comp (no ~25-38M popup). Reverted to DoT-noFb baseline pending reconciliation of the Designated-Target gate across comps.
documentedConfounds.why: The standing open item. Sim over-predicts in comps where 1687 does not fire (e.g. N5 snowwhite-HA 0.9237 / u7-style), and is the main driver of the spread (MAD 0.044).

documentedConfounds.text: 1687% modeled as a burstCast-triggered DoT (interval ~3s x3) rather than a true last-bullet-on-Designated-Target rider; arithmetic-consistent proxy, not a faithful trigger/timing model.
documentedConfounds.why: Proxy timing/trigger could mis-place damage across the FB window; same root as the open Designated-gate question.

documentedConfounds.text: noFb AUDIT: the 256.17% last-bullet rider is a normal-attack rider landing during FB -> noFb REMOVED (FB applies by timing). CONFIRMED by video (5,750,750 = 367,714 x ~15.64 FB-inclusive; non-FB 3.83M).
documentedConfounds.why: Confirmed half — video-verified, not a live source of gap.
Single partless boss never acts in v1; stun has no damage pathway.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1/burst auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) 2026-07-16 — behavior-identical to prior runtime parse, NOT hand-verified. skill1 4th line (Attack Damage 20.16%) and treasure multipliers (256.17/1687/1407.64) come from top-level prose, not the *_detail value tables (which carry base values 85.79/1089/457.87 and only 3 skill1 value groups).
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance caveat; values match the treasure remap and prior runtime behavior, but flagged as not hand-verified.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Privaty's treasure kit (synced via the treasure remap from synergy entry 198): S1 as full FB team buffs including the Max-Ammo -50.66% that accelerates everyone's last-bullet procs; S2 as a parser-faithful 256.17% + Damage-Taken 10.01% last-bullet rider plus the 1687% Designated-Target nuke approximated as a burstCast DoT (~3s x3) with noFb; burst as elemAdvantageDamagePct 130% + 1407.64% nuke + ATK-down, with the 3s stun dropped as inert. Key approximations: both S2 riders are noRange (exempt from range/FB majors, Q1-calibrated vs T4 with unconfirmed mechanism), and the 1687 is a trigger/timing proxy. The known-not-faithful spot is the 1687% Designated-Target gate, which is comp/condition-dependent (fires in T4/T4b but not the u7 comp) and is the standing open item behind the board spread.
